claim_scope: Native Linux x86_64 release-mode correctness only. Build time, test time, and live resource samples are not performance evidence.

source.archive_policy: Existing tracked and non-ignored untracked files, excluding scripts/evals, target, Git metadata, environment files, GGUF and safetensors files, partial downloads, and deleted index entries.

raw_result_tail: test result: ok. 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 77.35s

assertions: The exact pinned model size and SHA-256 are rechecked by the test.
Non-streaming Chat Completions returns visible content ' Steel' and finish_reason stop.
Streaming Chat Completions returns visible token IDs 2443 and 295 and terminates with one stop event.
Phi-3 terminal token 32007 contributes to completion usage but is not exposed in visible content.
Both routes report 10 prompt tokens, 3 completion tokens, 13 total tokens, and finish source eos.

diagnostic_samples.note: One live sample only. It is not a peak or a clean performance measurement.

infrastructure_notes: The Kubernetes control plane restarted repeatedly during the initial model transfer.
The public model bytes were then copied over a temporary LAN-only HTTP server bound to 192.168.50.113 and independently verified in the pod before use.
The temporary server was stopped before hashing, compilation, or test execution.
The test ran detached inside the bounded pod, so later API interruptions could not alter its process lifetime or exit marker.
The node is shared. No throughput, TTFT, RSS, energy, or build-speed claim follows from this artifact.
